classes.reasoning: Document explicitly titled 'INFORMED CONSENT FORM' with consent checkboxes, participant and investigator signature blocks, and version control stating 'ICF Version 2.0'.

intervention: BRC-471 (Lumitanib), an experimental dual EGFR/HER2 inhibitor
indication: EGFR-mutant NSCLC that has progressed on osimertinib
summary: This is an Informed Consent Form version 2.0 dated 22 August 2023 for study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001 testing BRC-471 (Lumitanib) in patients with EGFR-mutant NSCLC progressing on osimertinib. This version has been superseded by ICF v2.1 on 09 November 2023 and is marked DO NOT USE FOR NEW CONSENTS; patients originally consented on v2.0 were later re-consented using v3.0.
filename: FINAL FINAL use this consent v2 SIGNED.md
